ambiguities.source_text: Find the time between when a vehicle is first advertised on the site to when the vehicle was sold
ambiguities.ref:
delta_days = (ads["sale_date_dt"] - ads["first_publish"]
                  ).dt.total_seconds() / (24 * 3600)
ads["Days to Sell"] = delta_days.apply(
        lambda x: math.ceil(x) if pd.notna(x) else pd.NA)
